title: Lighting
description: Lighting: Lighting gains are defined as the amount of heat contributed by light fixtures

Sensible.description: The sensible heat contributed by light fixtures, which contributes to a rise in temperature with no change in phase.

RadiantFraction.description: The radiant fraction depicts the percentage of long wave radiant heat given off by the light fixtures.

LuminousEfficacy.description: Luminous efficacy is a measure of how well a light fixture produces visible light

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
